description: A portal view where customers can immediately see their balance, account history, and next steps without contacting an agent.
soft_benefit_note: Reduces inbound demand and improves customer clarity

description: Automatically generates structured promise-to-pay agreements and sends them to the customer for confirmation, ensuring commitments are recorded and trackable.
soft_benefit_note: Improves commitment visibility and follow-up reliability

description: Customers are presented with pre-defined payment plans based on balance thresholds, reducing the need for agent intervention in straightforward cases.
soft_benefit_note: Increases conversion into sustainable payment plans

description: Customers are prompted to confirm or update their contact details before progressing, ensuring accurate and complete case information.
soft_benefit_note: Improves contact success and reduces failed follow-ups

description: Cases are automatically routed based on balance, complexity, and completeness, ensuring the right handling path without manual triage.
soft_benefit_note: Prioritises agent time and reduces unnecessary workload

description: A system check ensures all required context and data fields are complete before escalation to managers.
soft_benefit_note: Reduces rework and improves escalation quality
